---
name: New harness adapter
about: Request support for a new AI coding agent CLI
labels: new-adapter
---

## Harness name

What is the tool called?

## Binary name

What command runs it? (e.g. `claude`, `codex`)

## How does it accept input?

- [ ] stdin (interactive)
- [ ] Command-line argument
- [ ] Other:

## Does it have a structured output mode?

- [ ] JSON / JSONL
- [ ] Stream-JSON
- [ ] HTTP API sideband
- [ ] JSON-RPC sideband
- [ ] None (screen parsing only)

## How does it signal completion?

What does the prompt look like when it is waiting for the next input? (e.g. `> `, `❯ `)

## Links

Documentation, GitHub repo, or other relevant references.
